title: operation quit
text: operation quit Defines the processing that should occur during a Quit request. If a quit trigger is defined in a component, it is exposed as the quit operation in the component signature. Explain this code operation quit { variablesBlock } Your code here ... end Copy Use All components. Description For more information, see the "trigger quit" and "trigger accept" topics. Related Links trigger quit Trigger that handles processing when a Quit request is received, usually with the intention of closing the component without saving any modifications made in it. This trigger is exposed as an operation in the component signature. trigger accept Handles processing when an Accept request is received, usually with the intention of closing the component and keeping all changes made on it. This trigger is exposed as an operation in the component signature. operation accept Defines the behavior that should occur in response to an Accept request. If an Accept trigger is defined, it is exposed as the accept operation in the component signature. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
